title: Meta Platforms - Wikipedia
snippet: Meta Platforms, Inc., doing business as Meta, is an American multinational technology conglomerate based in Menlo Park, California.

title: Tesla, Inc. - Wikipedia
snippet: Tesla, Inc. is an American multinational automotive and clean energy company headquartered in Austin, Texas.

title: Bitcoin - Wikipedia
snippet: Bitcoin is a decentralized digital currency that can be transferred on the peer-to-peer bitcoin network.
